title: Space Manual
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
[[File:SpaceManual.jpg|thumb|[[Sam Heggs]] uses his ''Space Manual''.]]
The '''''Space Manual''''' was an electronic book that contained listings for the species of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

==Appearances==
